channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marcos Urges Traders Against Hoarding and Profiteering as Middle East Tensions Drive Oil Price Concerns
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. issued a strong appeal to businessmen and traders on Friday, March 6, 2026, urging them not to exploit the escalating tensions in the Middle East for personal...

item.title: Kwankwasiyya Movement Claims Impeachment Bid Against Kano Deputy Governor Is Politically Motivated
item.description: The Kwankwasiyya Movement don raise alarm over the impeachment proceedings wey Kano State House of Assembly dey carry out against Deputy Governor Aminu Abdussalam Gwarzo. For dia statement wey dem rel...

item.title: The Risks and Impact of Public Investigation in the Epstein File Release
item.description: The January 30 release of over three million documents related to Jeffrey Epstein has sparked a wave of public scrutiny, with thousands of online users combing through the files. From popular politica...

item.title: Ex-law firm accounts secretary sentenced for defrauding clients of R13 million
item.description: Alwena Smith, 53, former senior accounts secretary at a Stellenbosch law firm, has been sentenced to an effective seven years’ direct imprisonment for defrauding the firm of over R13 million. Smith wo...

item.title: US and Israel escalate military operations in Iran and Lebanon amid regional tensions
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have escalated significantly as the US and Israel intensify military operations against Iran and Lebanon. The White House has stated that the campaign in Iran may last four...

item.title: Portable MRI enhances precision and safety in London brain surgeries
item.description: London Health Sciences Centre (LHSC) has introduced a portable MRI system that is revolutionizing brain surgery in the region. This new technology allows surgeons to obtain real-time images during pro...

item.title: REA Proposes N100 Billion for Hybrid Mini-Grids in Public Sector Solarisation Under 2026 Budget
item.description: The Rural Electrification Agency (REA) don talk say dem go use N100 billion for 2026 to install hybrid mini-grids for government agencies inside and outside Abuja. This one na part of the National Pub...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee Protests Against Removal of Names from Bengal Voter List
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has initiated a protest against what she claims are unjust deletions from the voter rolls in the state. The protest aims to highlight the alleged removal of ...

item.title: Limited UAE flights to the UK resume amid Middle East tensions
item.description: Following recent US-Israeli strikes on Iran and retaliatory Iranian attacks, several Middle Eastern countries have seen significant disruption to air travel. Emirates and Etihad have announced limited...

item.title: Philippine government implements temporary four-day workweek amid rising oil prices
item.description: Starting March 9, certain government offices in the Philippines will implement a temporary four-day onsite workweek, according to President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. This measure is part of broader governm...

item.title: Investigation Links Russian Military Intelligence to Parcel Fires Across Europe
item.description: Russian military intelligence is suspected of orchestrating a series of 'self-igniting' parcel incidents across Europe, including a notable fire at a DHL depot in Birmingham in July 2024. The investig...

item.title: UK-Based Blogger Maureen Badejo Remanded in Kirikiri Over Cyberstalking and Defamation Allegations
item.description: Na big matter dey unfold for Lagos as Federal High Court for Ikoyi don order say UK-based Nigerian blogger, Maureen Badejo, go remain for Kirikiri Correctional Centre. This na follow her arraignment o...

item.title: US Strategic Bombers Arrive at RAF Fairford Amid Escalating Tensions with Iran
item.description: Several US Air Force B-1 strategic bombers have arrived at RAF Fairford in Gloucestershire, signalling an imminent escalation of American military action against Iran. These bombers, each capable of c...

item.title: Tanzania Strengthens Security Measures for AFCON 2027 Tournament
item.description: Tanzania imeshamaliza kuanza kuchukua hatua za usalama makini kabla ya mashindano ya AFCON 2027. Katika mkutano uliofanyika Dar es Salaam, Kamati ya Taifa ya AFCON 2027 ilijadiliana na Kiongozi wa Usa...

item.title: Ontario Premier explores creating artificial land in Lake Ontario for new Toronto convention centre
item.description: Ontario Premier Doug Ford has confirmed he is considering the creation of artificial land in Lake Ontario to build a multibillion-dollar convention centre on Toronto’s waterfront. Speaking to reporter...

item.title: Firecracker Unit Blast in Vetlapalem Kills 28 Workers Due to Safety Violations
item.description: In Vetlapalem village of Kakinada district, Andhra Pradesh, a catastrophic explosion at the Sri Surya Fireworks unit on February 28, 2026, claimed 28 lives, including eight women. Preliminary investig...

item.title: AC Milan triumphs in marathon penalty shootout to enter Europa League group stage
item.description: AC Milan avoided elimination in the preliminary round of the Europa League by scoring a last-minute penalty in extra time and eventually winning a dramatic 24-kick shootout 9-8 against Rio Ave. The se...

item.title: HESLB Encourages Students to Combat Gender-Based Violence and Supports Girls’ Education
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, the Higher Education Students' Loans Board (HESLB) has called on students to actively take part in preventing gender-based violence (GBV) and promoting awareness in their communities...

item.title: Moja Expressway Waives Toll Fees for Two Hours Due to Flooding on Mombasa Road from Heavy Rains
item.description: On the evening of Friday, March 6, 2026, Nairobi motorists got a bit of relief when Moja Expressway, the operators of the Nairobi Expressway, announced a temporary waiver of toll charges. Due to heavy...

item.title: Bothaville Spar employee allegedly assaulted following refusal to take breathalyzer
item.description: A serious incident occurred at a Spar store in Bothaville, Free State, where a general employee, Tommy Morapedi, was allegedly assaulted by a security manager after refusing to take a breathalyzer tes...
